allow: PowerShell($allRoutes = @\("/", "/about", "/blog", "/contact", "/courses", "/courses/ielts-coaching", "/courses/celpip-training", "/courses/basic-to-advanced-english", "/courses/english-in-40-days", "/courses/english-for-telugu-speakers", "/courses/business-english", "/courses/workplace-english", "/courses/biolingo-program", "/courses/writing-skills", "/courses/phonetics", "/courses/english-literature", "/courses/teaching-for-success", "/courses/phonics-and-speaking-skills"\); foreach \($r in $allRoutes\) { try { $code = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $code = "ERR" }; Write-Host "$r -> $code" })
